commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a SQLite-backed per-agent session/transcript store foundation, schema/types, accessor helpers, conformance tests, and a CI boundary ratchet while preserving file-backed runtime behavior for now.

PR surface: Source +2454, Tests +1725, Config +6, Generated +220, Other +146. Total +4551 across 24 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows SQLite read helpers using the schema-creating opener and session deletes under cascading transcript FKs; this review did not run tests because the task is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR is protected, draft/dirty, missing proof, and blocked on storage-retention/API decisions that should stay with maintainers rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: refactor: add SQLite session store foundation
target.body:
## What

Path 3 / PR 3.2 for #88838 adds the unused, additive SQLite session/transcript store foundation behind the 3.1a accessor seam. It introduces the per-agent SQLite schema, generated Kysely types, SQLite-backed session/transcript accessor helpers, and shared conformance coverage while preserving the current file-backed runtime behavior.

## Why

The SQLite storage flip should not land in the same PR as caller rewrites or legacy migration work. This foundation lets the disposable validation branches exercise the future SQLite backend against the existing accessor seam, while production runtime remains file-backed until later Path 3 slices complete the caller adoption, doctor migration, and atomic storage flip.

## Changes

- Added additive per-agent SQLite schema/store modules
- Added file/SQLite accessor conformance tests
- Added transcript read-scope SQLite support
- Added canonical `sessions.json` path resolution parity
- Added `preserveActivity` parity for SQLite patches
- Serialized SQLite entry writes and transcript idempotency
- Added exact-key SQLite session lookup
- Excluded runtime storage wiring and migration work

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/state/openclaw-agent-schema.sql` | Adds session/transcript tables |
| `src/state/openclaw-agent-db.ts` | Adds per-agent SQLite DB helper |
| `src/config/sessions/session-accessor.sqlite.ts` | Implements additive SQLite accessor helpers |
| `src/config/sessions/session-accessor.conformance.test.ts` | Shares file/SQLite behavior coverage |
| `src/config/sessions/session-accessor.ts` | Carries canonical exact-key seam dependency |

Included scope: additive SQLite session/transcript store foundation, transcript read-scope support, path-resolution parity, `preserveActivity` parity, serialized SQLite writes/idempotency fixes, and exact-key SQLite lookup.

Excluded scope: transcript identity/state adapter, transcript delete/existence APIs, branch/successor mutation APIs, compaction checkpoint SQLite APIs, production storage flip/runtime wiring, doctor migration, and runtime dual-read/fallback. Follow-up blocker: `clawdbot-d02.1.9.1.21` for the SQLite transcript identity/state adapter.

## Testing

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/sessions/session-accessor.conformance.test.ts src/config/sessions/session-accessor.test.ts` passed, including exact-key proof from `91a33a9bea`
- `node scripts/generate-kysely-types.mjs --verify` passed
- `pnpm tsgo:core` passed
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test` passed
- `git diff --check` passed
- `pnpm build` passed
- `autoreview --mode local` returned clean after the false-success unchecked duplicate append issue was fixed
target.author: jalehman
